channel.title: computer-vision on Luke Salamone's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in computer-vision on Luke Salamone's Blog

item.title: How Does Convolution Work?
item.description: You have probably heard of convolution in the context of convolutional neural networks. But what’s really going on? Well, I think the easiest way to explain is with an interactive demo. Feel free to play around with the parameters below to see for yourself! Demo Settings Here you can control the hyperparameters of the convolutional layer. padding: kernel size: stride: speed: As you’ve probably figured out, the left side shows the input, a 20x20 handwritten digit, and the right side shows the output as it is being drawn.
